                            "type": "text",
                            "text": block.text,
                        })
                    elif ToolUseBlock is not None and isinstance(block, ToolUseBlock):
                        trace_entry["content"].append({
                            "type": "tool_use",
                            "id": block.id,
                            "name": block.name,
                            "input": block.input,
                        })
                    elif ToolResultBlock is not None and isinstance(block, ToolResultBlock):
                        # ToolResult content еҸҜиғҪжҳҜ str жҲ– list[dict]пјҢ
                        # жҲӘж–ӯи¶…еӨ§иҫ“еҮәд»ҘжҺ§еҲ¶ж—Ҙеҝ—еӨ§е°Ҹ
                        raw_content = block.content
                        if isinstance(raw_content, str) and len(raw_content) > 50000:
                            raw_content = raw_content[:50000] + "\n...(truncated)"
                        trace_entry["content"].append({
                            "type": "tool_result",
                            "tool_use_id": block.tool_use_id,
                            "content": raw_content,
                            "is_error": block.is_error,
                        })
                    elif ThinkingBlock is not None and isinstance(block, ThinkingBlock):
                        trace_entry["content"].append({
                            "type": "thinking",
                            "thinking": block.thinking[:20000] if len(block.thinking) > 20000 else block.thinking,
                        })
                full_trace.append(trace_entry)
            elif isinstance(message, ResultMessage):
                # жҸҗеҸ– session_id дҫӣеҗҺз»ӯ attempt еӨҚз”Ё
                if hasattr(message, "session_id") and message.session_id:
                    self._session_id = message.session_id
                    print(f"[AGENT] е·ІиҺ·еҸ–дјҡиҜқ ID: {self._session_id[:16]}...")
                if hasattr(message, "text") and message.text:
                    chunks.append(message.text)
                full_trace.append({
                    "type": "result",
                    "subtype": getattr(message, "subtype", ""),
                    "duration_ms": getattr(message, "duration_ms", 0),
                    "duration_api_ms": getattr(message, "duration_api_ms", 0),
                    "is_error": getattr(message, "is_error", False),
                    "num_turns": getattr(message, "num_turns", 0),
                    "session_id": getattr(message, "session_id", ""),
                    "total_cost_usd": getattr(message, "total_cost_usd", None),
                    "usage": getattr(message, "usage", None),
                    "result": getattr(message, "result", None),
                })
            else:
                # SystemMessage, UserMessage зӯүе…¶д»–ж¶ҲжҒҜзұ»еһӢ
                trace_entry = {"type": type(message).__name__}
                if hasattr(message, "subtype"):
                    trace_entry["subtype"] = message.subtype
                if hasattr(message, "data"):
                    trace_entry["data"] = message.data
                if hasattr(message, "content"):
                    raw = message.content
                    if isinstance(raw, str):
                        trace_entry["content"] = raw[:20000] if len(raw) > 20000 else raw
                    elif isinstance(raw, list):
                        trace_entry["content"] = [
                            {"type": type(b).__name__, **{k: v for k, v in vars(b).items()}}
                            for b in raw
                        ]
                full_trace.append(trace_entry)

        result = "\n".join(chunks)

        # жҸҗеҸ– Claude Code жҢҮж Ү
        # Claude Code жҢҮж ҮжҸҗеҸ–пјҲе·Із§»йҷӨпјҢд»…иҜ„дј° openclaw жЁЎејҸпјү
        self._last_attempt_metrics = None

        # и®°еҪ• Agent е“Қеә”пјҲеҗ«е®Ңж•ҙ tool use иҪЁиҝ№пјү
        self._log_message("assistant", result, attempt, "response",
                         metadata={
                             "agent_type": "claude_code",
                             "model": self.env_config.target_model,
                             "session_id": self._session_id,
                             "tool_use_trace": full_trace,
                         })

        return result

    def _send_openclaw(self, prompt: str, workspace: Path, attempt: int) -> str:
        """йҖҡиҝҮ openclaw CLI subprocess еҸ‘йҖҒпјҲagent --local жЁЎејҸпјү

        Session з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹпјҲдёҺ Claude Code дёҖиҮҙпјүпјҡ
        - Attempt 1: дёҚдј  --session-idпјҢдҪҝз”Ё --to eval еҗҜеҠЁж–°дјҡиҜқ
        - Attempt 2+: дј  --session-idпјҲдёҚеҶҚдј  --toпјҢдёӨиҖ…дә’ж–ҘпјүпјҢеӨҚз”ЁдјҡиҜқ

        API ж—Ҙеҝ—д»ЈзҗҶпјҡ
        - еңЁ openclaw е’ҢжЁЎеһӢ API д№Ӣй—ҙжҸ’е…ҘйҖҸжҳҺд»ЈзҗҶ
        - жҚ•иҺ·е®Ңж•ҙзҡ„ tool_callsгҖҒtool resultsгҖҒtoken usage
        - ж—Ҙеҝ—дҝқеӯҳеҲ° workspace/api_proxy_log.jsonl
        """
        proxy = None
        try:
            message_type = "initial_prompt" if attempt == 1 else "retry_prompt"
            self._log_message("user", prompt, attempt, message_type)

            # === еҗҜеҠЁ API ж—Ҙеҝ—д»ЈзҗҶ ===
            proxy_url = None
            real_api_base = self.env_config.api_base or "https://api.openai.com/v1"
            try:
                proxy = APILoggingProxy(
                    target_base_url=real_api_base,
                    log_dir=workspace,
                )
                proxy.start()
                proxy_url = proxy.get_proxy_url()
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[PROXY] API ж—Ҙеҝ—д»ЈзҗҶеҗҜеҠЁеӨұиҙҘ: {e}пјҢйҷҚзә§еҲ°ж— ж—Ҙеҝ—жЁЎејҸ")
                proxy = None
                proxy_url = None

            # еҶҷе…Ҙ/жӣҙж–° openclaw й…ҚзҪ®пјҲдҪҝз”Ёд»ЈзҗҶ URL жҲ–зӣҙиҝһпјү
            self._write_openclaw_config(workspace, proxy_url=proxy_url)

            # еҶҷе…Ҙ AGENTS.md жіЁе…Ҙзі»з»ҹжҸҗзӨәпјҲд»…йҰ–ж¬Ўпјү
            self._write_openclaw_agents_md(workspace)

            # зЎ®дҝқ gateway е·ІеҗҜеҠЁпјҲexec tool йңҖиҰҒпјү
            self._start_openclaw_gateway()

            timeout = int(os.environ.get("OPENCLAW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", "600"))

            # жһ„е»әе‘Ҫд»Ө
            cmd = [
                "openclaw", "agent", "--local",
                "--message", prompt,
                "--json",
                "--timeout", str(timeout),
            ]

            # Attempt 2+ дё”жңү session_id ж—¶пјҢеӨҚз”ЁдјҡиҜқпјҲ--session-id дёҺ --to дә’ж–Ҙпјү
            if attempt > 1 and self._session_id:
                cmd.extend(["--session-id", self._session_id])
                print(f"[AGENT] е»¶з»ӯ OpenClaw дјҡиҜқ (session: {self._session_id[:16]}...)")
            else:
                cmd.extend(["--to", "eval"])
                print(f"[AGENT] еҗҜеҠЁж–° OpenClaw дјҡиҜқ")

            # и®ҫзҪ®е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•зҺҜеўғ
            env = os.environ.copy()
            env["OPENCLAW_API_KEY"] = self.env_config.api_key
            # еҰӮжһңжңүд»ЈзҗҶпјҢenv дёӯзҡ„ BASE_URL д№ҹжҢҮеҗ‘д»ЈзҗҶпјҲopenclaw еҸҜиғҪдјҳе…Ҳз”ЁзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјү
            if proxy_url:
                env["OPENCLAW_BASE_URL"] = proxy_url
            elif self.env_config.api_base:
                env["OPENCLAW_BASE_URL"] = self.env_config.api_base

            print(f"[AGENT] OpenClaw CLI и°ғз”Ё: openclaw agent --local (attempt {attempt})")

            proc = subprocess.run(
                cmd,
                cwd=str(workspace),
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=timeout + 60,  # йўқеӨ–з•ҷ 60s з»ҷиҝӣзЁӢеҗҜеҒң
                env=env,
            )

            if proc.returncode != 0:
                stderr = proc.stderr.strip()
                print(f"[AGENT] OpenClaw CLI иҝ”еӣһйқһйӣ¶йҖҖеҮәз Ғ {proc.returncode}")
                if stderr:
                    print(f"[AGENT] stderr: {stderr[:500]}")

            # и§Јжһҗ JSON иҫ“еҮә
            stdout = proc.stdout.strip()
            result = ""
            raw_output = None  # дҝқеӯҳе®Ңж•ҙеҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“еҮәз”ЁдәҺж—Ҙеҝ—

            if stdout:
                try:
                    output = json.loads(stdout)
                    raw_output = output  # дҝқз•ҷе®Ңж•ҙ JSON з»“жһ„

                    # жҸҗеҸ–еӣһеӨҚж–Үжң¬: payloads[0].text жҲ– result
                    payloads = output.get("payloads", [])
                    if payloads and isinstance(payloads, list):
                        result = payloads[0].get("text", "")
                    if not result:
                        result = output.get("result", "")
                    if not result:
                        result = stdout  # fallback: еҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“еҮә

                    # жҸҗеҸ– session_id дҫӣеҗҺз»ӯ attempt еӨҚз”Ё
                    meta = output.get("meta", {})
                    agent_meta = meta.get("agentMeta", {})
                    session_id = agent_meta.get("sessionId", "")
                    if session_id:
                        self._session_id = session_id
                        print(f"[AGENT] е·ІиҺ·еҸ–дјҡиҜқ ID: {self._session_id[:16]}...")

                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    print(f"[AGENT] OpenClaw иҫ“еҮәйқһ JSONпјҢдҪҝз”ЁеҺҹе§Ӣ stdout")
                    result = stdout
                    raw_output = {"_raw_text": stdout[:100000]}
            else:
                result = proc.stderr.strip() or "Error: No output from openclaw CLI"

            # === еҒңжӯўд»ЈзҗҶ + и§Јжһҗжү§иЎҢиҪЁиҝ№ ===
            execution_trace = None
            if proxy:
                proxy.stop()
                try:
                    execution_trace, proxy_metrics = parse_proxy_logs(proxy.get_log_path())
                    if proxy_metrics:
                        self._last_attempt_metrics = proxy_metrics
                        m = proxy_metrics
                        print(f"[METRICS] OpenClaw (via proxy): "
                              f"api_calls={m.api_call_count}, "
                              f"tool_calls={m.tool_call_count}, "
                              f"tokens={m.tokens.total_tokens if m.tokens else 'N/A'}")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"[PROXY] д»ЈзҗҶж—Ҙеҝ—и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
                proxy = None

            # еҰӮжһңд»ЈзҗҶжІЎжҸҗдҫӣжҢҮж ҮпјҢи®°еҪ•еҹәжң¬дҝЎжҒҜ
            if not self._last_attempt_metrics:
                self._last_attempt_metrics = None

            self._log_message("assistant", result, attempt, "response",
                             metadata={
                                 "agent_type": "openclaw",
                                 "model": self.env_config.target_model,
                                 "session_id": self._session_id,
                                 "exit_code": proc.returncode,
                                 "raw_openclaw_output": raw_output,
                                 "execution_trace": execution_trace,
                             })

            return result

        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            # и¶…ж—¶д№ҹиҰҒи§Јжһҗ proxy ж—Ҙеҝ—пјҲйҮҢйқўжңүе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„жү§иЎҢиҪЁиҝ№пјү
            if proxy:
                proxy.stop()
                try:
                    execution_trace, proxy_metrics = parse_proxy_logs(proxy.get_log_path())
                    if proxy_metrics:
                        self._last_attempt_metrics = proxy_metrics
                        m = proxy_metrics
                        print(f"[METRICS] OpenClaw (via proxy, timed out): "
                              f"api_calls={m.api_call_count}, "
                              f"tool_calls={m.tool_call_count}, "
                              f"tokens={m.tokens.total_tokens if m.tokens else 'N/A'}")
                except Exception as e2:
                    print(f"[PROXY] д»ЈзҗҶж—Ҙеҝ—и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ: {e2}")
            error_msg = f"Error: OpenClaw CLI timed out after {int(os.environ.get('OPENCLAW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS', '600')) + 60}s"
            print(f"[AGENT] {error_msg}")
            self._log_message("system", error_msg, attempt, "error",
                             metadata={"execution_trace": execution_trace} if execution_trace else None)
            return error_msg
        except Exception as e:
            if proxy:
                proxy.stop()
                try:
                    execution_trace, proxy_metrics = parse_proxy_logs(proxy.get_log_path())
                    if proxy_metrics:
                        self._last_attempt_metrics = proxy_metrics
                except Exception:
                    pass
            print(f"[AGENT] OpenClaw CLI и°ғз”ЁеӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
            error_msg = f"Error: {e}"
            self._log_message("system", error_msg, attempt, "error")
            return error_msg

    def _manual_mode(self, prompt: str, workspace: Path, attempt: int) -> str:

        """жүӢеҠЁжЁЎејҸ - зӯүеҫ…з”ЁжҲ·е®ҢжҲҗд»»еҠЎ"""
        # и®°еҪ•з”ЁжҲ· prompt
        message_type = "initial_prompt" if attempt == 1 else "retry_prompt"
        self._log_message("user", prompt, attempt, message_type)

        # е°Ҷ prompt дҝқеӯҳеҲ° workspace
        prompt_file = workspace / "TASK_PROMPT.md"
        prompt_file.write_text(prompt, encoding="utf-8")

        print("\n" + "=" * 60)
        print("жүӢеҠЁжЁЎејҸ - иҜ·е®ҢжҲҗд»ҘдёӢд»»еҠЎ")
        print("=" * 60)
        print(f"\nе·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•: {workspace}")
        print(f"д»»еҠЎиҜҙжҳҺе·ІдҝқеӯҳеҲ°: {prompt_file}")
        print("\nиҜ·еңЁдёҠиҝ°зӣ®еҪ•дёӯе®ҢжҲҗд»»еҠЎпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҢү Enter з»§з»ӯиҜ„дј°...")
        print("(жҲ–иҫ“е…Ҙ 'skip' и·іиҝҮжӯӨж¬Ўе°қиҜ•)")
        print("=" * 60)

        user_input = input("\nжҢү Enter з»§з»ӯпјҢжҲ–иҫ“е…Ҙ 'skip' и·іиҝҮ: ").strip().lower()

        if user_input == "skip":
            result = "[MANUAL] User skipped this attempt"
        else:
            result = "[MANUAL] User completed the task manually"

        # и®°еҪ•жүӢеҠЁжЁЎејҸе“Қеә”
        self._log_message("assistant", result, attempt, "response",
                         metadata={"agent_type": "manual"})

        return result


# =============================================================================
# иҜ„дј°жү§иЎҢеҷЁ
# =============================================================================

class TaskEvaluator:
    """д»»еҠЎиҜ„дј°еҷЁ"""
    
    def __init__(self, env_config: EnvConfig, agent: AgentRunner,
                 isolated_workspace: Optional[Path] = None,
                 output_dir: Optional[Path] = None):
        self.env_config = env_config
        self.agent = agent
        self.description = read_json(SCRIPT_DIR / "description.json")
        self.task_id = self.description.get("task_id", "unknown")
        
        # Docker йҡ”зҰ»жЁЎејҸй…ҚзҪ®
        self.isolated_mode = isolated_workspace is not None or output_dir is not None
        self.isolated_workspace = isolated_workspace
        self.output_dir = output_dir
        
        if self.isolated_mode:
            # йҡ”зҰ»жЁЎејҸпјҡдҪҝз”ЁжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•
            if output_dir:
                self.run_dir = output_dir.resolve()
            else:
                self.run_dir = SCRIPT_DIR / env_config.model_name
            
            # йҡ”зҰ»е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•дҪңдёә Agent зҡ„е·ҘдҪңеҢә
            if isolated_workspace:
                self.isolated_workspace = isolated_workspace.resolve()
                ensure_directory(self.isolated_workspace)
                print(f"[ISOLATED] Agent е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•: {self.isolated_workspace}")
        else:
            # жҷ®йҖҡжЁЎејҸпјҡеңЁ query зӣ®еҪ•дёӢеҲӣе»әжЁЎеһӢиҝҗиЎҢзӣ®еҪ•
            self.run_dir = SCRIPT_DIR / env_config.model_name
        
        ensure_directory(self.run_dir)
        print(f"[OUTPUT] иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•: {self.run_dir}")
        
        # workspace зӣ®еҪ•жЁЎжқҝ (Agent еҸӘиғҪзңӢеҲ°иҝҷдёӘзӣ®еҪ•зҡ„еҶ…е®№)
        self.workspace_template = SCRIPT_DIR / "workspace"
        
    def build_initial_prompt(self, subtask: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        """жһ„е»әеҲқе§Ӣд»»еҠЎзҡ„ promptпјҲз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўе°қиҜ•пјү"""
        query = subtask.get("query", "")
        deliverables = subtask.get("deliverables", [])
        
        prompt_parts = [
            f"# Task: {self.description.get('task_name', 'Unknown Task')}",
            "",
            "## Query",
            query,
            "",
            "## Deliverables",
        ]
        
        for i, d in enumerate(deliverables, 1):
            prompt_parts.append(f"{i}. {d}")
        
        prompt_parts.extend([
            "",
            "## Instructions",
            "- Work in the current directory",
            "- Create all required files as specified",
            "- Ensure the code is runnable and produces the expected output",
        ])
        
        return "\n".join(prompt_parts)
    
    def build_retry_prompt(self, attempt: int, score: float, feedback: str) -> str:
        """жһ„е»ә retry зҡ„ promptпјҲеҗҺз»ӯе°қиҜ•пјү
        
        жіЁж„ҸпјҡиҝҷжҳҜеңЁеҗҢдёҖиҪ®еҜ№иҜқдёӯеҸ‘йҖҒзҡ„еҗҺз»ӯж¶ҲжҒҜпјҢAgent еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°д№ӢеүҚзҡ„е…ЁйғЁжү§иЎҢиҪЁиҝ№гҖӮ
        еҸҚйҰҲе·ІеҗҢж—¶еҶҷе…Ҙе·ҘдҪңеҢә EVALUATION_FEEDBACK.txtпјҢAgent еҸҜиҜ»еҸ–иҜҘж–Үд»¶иҺ·еҸ–е®Ңж•ҙиҜ„дј°з»“жһңгҖӮ
        """
        prompt_parts = [
            f"# Evaluation Result for Attempt {attempt - 1}",
            "",
            feedback,
            "",
            "## Retry Instructions",
            f"Your previous attempt scored {score}/100. The full evaluation feedback has been saved to **EVALUATION_FEEDBACK.txt** in your workspace. Please read that file for the exact issues and fix them.",
            "You have access to your previous work and can see all your prior actions and files.",
            "Please modify or create the required output files to address the issues above. Focus on the specific deduction reasons and the comment in the feedback.",
        ]
        
        return "\n".join(prompt_parts)
    
    def generate_feedback(self, score: float, report: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        """ж №жҚ®иҜ„дј°жҠҘе‘Ҡз”ҹжҲҗеҸҚйҰҲ"""
        feedback_parts = [f"Score: {score}/100"]
        
        # жҸҗеҸ–жүЈеҲҶеҺҹеӣ 
        result_report = report.get("з»“жһңиҜ„еҲҶ", {})
        process_report = report.get("иҝҮзЁӢиҜ„еҲҶ", {})
        
        deductions = []
        deductions.extend(result_report.get("жүЈеҲҶеҺҹеӣ ", []))
        deductions.extend(process_report.get("жүЈеҲҶеҺҹеӣ ", []))
        
        if deductions:
            feedback_parts.append("\nIssues found:")
            for i, d in enumerate(deductions, 1):
                feedback_parts.append(f"  {i}. {d}")
        
        feedback_parts.append(f"\nComment: {report.get('иҜ„иҜӯ', '')}")
        
        return "\n".join(feedback_parts)
    
    def run_single_attempt(self, subtask: Dict[str, Any], attempt_index: int, 
                           workspace: Path, feedback: str = "") -> AttemptResult:
        """иҝҗиЎҢеҚ•ж¬Ўе°қиҜ•
        
        Args:
            subtask: еӯҗд»»еҠЎжҸҸиҝ°
            attempt_index: е°қиҜ•еәҸеҸ·
            workspace: Agent е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•пјҲжүҖжңү attempt е…ұз”Ёпјү
            feedback: дёҠдёҖж¬Ўзҡ„еҸҚйҰҲпјҲеҰӮжһңжңүпјү
        """
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Attempt {attempt_index}")
        print(f"{'='*60}")
        
        # иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•пјҲеҸӘеӯҳж”ҫдә§еҮәж–Үд»¶пјү
        output_attempt_dir = self.run_dir / f"attempt_{attempt_index}"
        
        # жһ„е»ә prompt
        if attempt_index == 1:
            prompt = self.build_initial_prompt(subtask)
        else:
            # иҺ·еҸ–дёҠдёҖж¬Ўзҡ„еҲҶж•°пјҲд»Һ feedback дёӯи§ЈжһҗжҲ–дј е…Ҙпјү
            prev_score = self._parse_score_from_feedback(feedback)
            prompt = self.build_retry_prompt(attempt_index, prev_score, feedback)
        
        print(f"\n[PROMPT] Length: {len(prompt)} chars")

        # еҝ«з…§е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•пјҲз”ЁдәҺеҗҺз»ӯ diff еҮә agent ж–°е»ә/дҝ®ж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјү
        pre_snapshot = snapshot_workspace(workspace)

        # и°ғз”Ё AgentпјҲеңЁеҗҢдёҖдёӘ session дёӯпјҢдј йҖ’ attempt еҸӮж•°пјү
        print("\n[AGENT] Running...")
        start_time = time.time()
        agent_output = self.agent.send(prompt, workspace, attempt=attempt_index)
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        print(f"[AGENT] Completed in {elapsed:.1f}s, output length: {len(agent_output)} chars")

        # жЈҖжөӢжҳҜеҗҰи¶…ж—¶
        is_timeout = agent_output.startswith("Error:") and "timed out" in agent_output
        if is_timeout:
            timeout_secs = int(os.environ.get("OPENCLAW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", "600")) + 60
            print(f"\n[TIMEOUT] Agent и¶…ж—¶ ({timeout_secs}s)пјҢе°ҶиҜ„дј°е·Ідә§еҮәзҡ„йғЁеҲҶж–Үд»¶")

        # жүҫеҮә agent ж–°е»ә/дҝ®ж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶
        agent_files = diff_workspace(workspace, pre_snapshot)
        print(f"[OUTPUT] Agent ж–°е»ә/дҝ®ж”№дәҶ {len(agent_files)} дёӘж–Үд»¶")

        # вҳ… е…Ҳдҝқеӯҳ agent дә§еҮәж–Үд»¶еҲ°иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•пјҲзЎ®дҝқеҚідҪҝеҗҺз»ӯ rubric иҜ„еҲҶеӨұиҙҘпјҢж–Үд»¶д№ҹдёҚдјҡдёўеӨұпјү
        ensure_directory(output_attempt_dir)
        clear_directory(output_attempt_dir)
        print(f"[OUTPUT] дҝқеӯҳдә§еҮәж–Үд»¶еҲ°: {output_attempt_dir}")
        copy_workspace(workspace, output_attempt_dir, only_files=agent_files)

        # еӨҚеҲ¶ API д»ЈзҗҶж—Ҙеҝ—пјҲеҰӮжһңеӯҳеңЁпјүеҲ°иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•
        proxy_log = workspace / "api_proxy_log.jsonl"
        if proxy_log.exists():
            shutil.copy2(proxy_log, output_attempt_dir / "api_proxy_log.jsonl")
            print(f"[OUTPUT] API д»ЈзҗҶж—Ҙеҝ—е·ІеӨҚеҲ¶: {proxy_log.stat().st_size / 1024:.1f} KB")

        # иҜ„дј°йҖ»иҫ‘пјҡеҢәеҲҶи¶…ж—¶гҖҒж— дә§еҮәгҖҒжӯЈеёёе®ҢжҲҗ
        if len(agent_files) == 0:
            if is_timeout:
                print("\n[EVAL] Agent и¶…ж—¶дё”жңӘдә§еҮәд»»дҪ•ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҲӨ 0 еҲҶ")
                score = 0
                report = {
                    "жҖ»еҲҶ": 0,
                    "timeout": True,
                    "timeout_reason": f"Agent timed out after {int(os.environ.get('OPENCLAW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS', '600'))}s without producing any files",
                    "з»“жһңиҜ„еҲҶ": {"еҲҶж•°": 0, "иҜҰжғ…": {"й”ҷиҜҜ": "Agent и¶…ж—¶пјҢжңӘдә§еҮәд»»дҪ•ж–Үд»¶"}},
                    "иҝҮзЁӢиҜ„еҲҶ": {"еҲҶж•°": 0, "иҜҰжғ…": {"й”ҷиҜҜ": "Agent и¶…ж—¶"}},
                    "agent_no_output": True,
                }
            else:
                print("\n[EVAL] Agent жңӘдә§еҮәд»»дҪ•ж–Үд»¶пјҢзӣҙжҺҘеҲӨ 0 еҲҶ")
                score = 0
                report = {
                    "жҖ»еҲҶ": 0,
                    "з»“жһңиҜ„еҲҶ": {"еҲҶж•°": 0, "иҜҰжғ…": {"й”ҷиҜҜ": "Agent жңӘж–°е»әжҲ–дҝ®ж”№д»»дҪ•ж–Үд»¶"}},
                    "иҝҮзЁӢиҜ„еҲҶ": {"еҲҶж•°": 0, "иҜҰжғ…": {"й”ҷиҜҜ": "Agent жңӘжү§иЎҢд»»дҪ•ж“ҚдҪң"}},
                    "agent_no_output": True,
                }
        else:
            # жңүдә§еҮәж–Үд»¶ вҖ” жӯЈеёёиҜ„дј°пјҲеҚідҪҝи¶…ж—¶д№ҹиҜ„дј°йғЁеҲҶдә§еҮәпјү
            if is_timeout:
                print(f"\n[EVAL] Agent и¶…ж—¶дҪҶдә§еҮәдәҶ {len(agent_files)} дёӘж–Үд»¶пјҢдҪҝз”Ё rubric иҜ„дј°йғЁеҲҶдә§еҮә...")
            else:
                print("\n[EVAL] Evaluating results...")

            # е°Ҷ agent еҶҷеҲ°еӯҗзӣ®еҪ•пјҲеҰӮ context/пјүдёӢзҡ„дә§еҮәж–Үд»¶иҪҜй“ҫеҲ° workspace ж №зӣ®еҪ•
            # д»ҘзЎ®дҝқ rubric иғҪеңЁ workspace ж №зӣ®еҪ•дёӢжүҫеҲ°е®ғд»¬
            for af in agent_files:
                src_file = workspace / af
                basename = Path(af).name
                root_target = workspace / basename
                # еҸӘеӨ„зҗҶеңЁеӯҗзӣ®еҪ•дёӯзҡ„ж–Үд»¶пјҢдё”ж №зӣ®еҪ•дёӢжІЎжңүеҗҢеҗҚж–Үд»¶зҡ„жғ…еҶө
                if "/" in af and not root_target.exists() and src_file.exists():
                    try:
                        os.symlink(src_file, root_target)
                    except OSError:
                        pass

            score, report = evaluate(str(workspace))
            # еңЁжҠҘе‘Ҡдёӯж ҮжіЁи¶…ж—¶дҝЎжҒҜ
            if is_timeout:
                if isinstance(report, dict):
                    report["timeout"] = True
                    report["timeout_reason"] = f"Agent timed out after {int(os.environ.get('OPENCLAW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS', '600'))}s - score reflects partial completion"
                print(f"[EVAL] и¶…ж—¶йғЁеҲҶдә§еҮәиҜ„еҲҶ: {score}/100")

        print(f"[EVAL] Score: {score}/100")
        
        # з”ҹжҲҗеҸҚйҰҲ
        new_feedback = self.generate_feedback(score, report)
        
        # е°ҶеҸҚйҰҲеҶҷе…Ҙе·ҘдҪңеҢәпјҢдҫӣдёӢдёҖиҪ®е°қиҜ•ж—¶ Agent иҜ»еҸ–пјҲзЎ®дҝқеҺҶеҸІдёҺеҸҚйҰҲиў«еҲ©з”Ёпјү
        feedback_file = workspace / "EVALUATION_FEEDBACK.txt"
        try:
            feedback_file.write_text(new_feedback, encoding="utf-8")
            print(f"[FEEDBACK] е·ІеҶҷе…Ҙ {feedback_file} дҫӣдёӢдёҖиҪ®еҸӮиҖғ")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[FEEDBACK] еҶҷе…Ҙе·ҘдҪңеҢәеӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
        
        # и®°еҪ•иҜ„дј°з»“жһңеҲ°еҜ№иҜқиҪЁиҝ№
        self.agent._log_message(
            role="evaluation",
            content=new_feedback,
            attempt=attempt_index,
            message_type="evaluation_result",
            metadata={
                "score": score,
                "passed": score >= 80,
                "report": report,
                "elapsed_seconds": elapsed
            }
        )
        
        # еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰйҖҡиҝҮпјҲдҝқз•ҷ passed еӯ—ж®өз”ЁдәҺи®°еҪ•пјҢдҪҶдёҚеҶҚз”ЁдәҺжҸҗеүҚз»Ҳжӯўпјү
        passed = score >= 80  # 80еҲҶеҸҠж ј
        
        # жҚ•иҺ· Agent жҢҮж Ү
        attempt_metrics = self.agent._last_attempt_metrics
        if attempt_metrics:
            attempt_metrics.duration_seconds = elapsed
        self.agent._last_attempt_metrics = None  # йҮҚзҪ®

        return AttemptResult(
            attempt_index=attempt_index,
            score=score,
            passed=passed,
            workspace_path=output_attempt_dir,  # иҝ”еӣһиҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•и·Ҝеҫ„
            agent_output=agent_output,
            eval_report=report,
            feedback=new_feedback,
            metrics=attempt_metrics,
            timed_out=is_timeout,
        )
    
    def _parse_score_from_feedback(self, feedback: str) -> float:
        """д»Һ feedback дёӯи§ЈжһҗеҲҶж•°"""
        try:
            # feedback ж јејҸ: "Score: XX/100\n..."
            if "Score:" in feedback:
                score_line = feedback.split("\n")[0]
                score_str = score_line.split(":")[1].split("/")[0].strip()
                return float(score_str)
        except:
            pass
        return 0.0
    
    def run(self) -> EvalSummary:
        """иҝҗиЎҢе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„иҜ„дј°жөҒзЁӢпјҲеңЁеҗҢдёҖиҪ®еҜ№иҜқдёӯж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡиҪ® retryпјү
        
        е…ій”®ж”№иҝӣпјҡ
        - жүҖжңү retry еңЁеҗҢдёҖдёӘ Agent дјҡиҜқдёӯиҝӣиЎҢ
        - Agent еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°д№ӢеүҚзҡ„жү§иЎҢиҪЁиҝ№гҖҒtool use зӯү
        - жӣҙжҷәиғҪең°еҹәдәҺдёҠдёӢж–ҮиҝӣиЎҢдҝ®еӨҚ
        - дҝқеӯҳе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„еҜ№иҜқиҪЁиҝ№еҲ° conversation_log.json
        """
        start_time = get_timestamp()
        
        # иҺ·еҸ–еӯҗд»»еҠЎ
        subtask = self.description.get("subtask1", {})
        
        attempts: List[AttemptResult] = []
        best_score = 0
        best_attempt = 0
        passed = False
        feedback = ""
        
        # еҮҶеӨҮе·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•пјҲжүҖжңү attempt е…ұз”Ёпјү
        if self.isolated_mode and self.isolated_workspace:
            workspace = self.isolated_workspace
        else:
            workspace = self.run_dir / "_workspace_temp"
        
        # еҲқе§ӢеҢ–е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•
        ensure_directory(workspace)
        clear_directory(workspace)
        
        # еӨҚеҲ¶ workspace жЁЎжқҝпјҲиҫ“е…Ҙж–Үд»¶пјү
        if self.workspace_template.exists():
            copy_input_files(self.workspace_template, workspace)
        # еӨҚеҲ¶ context зӣ®еҪ•пјҲиҫ“е…Ҙж–Үд»¶пјү
        context_src = SCRIPT_DIR / "context"
        if context_src.exists():
            context_dst = workspace / "context"
            copy_input_files(context_src, context_dst)

        # еӨҚеҲ¶ .env еҲ°е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•пјҲдҫӣ rubric LLM-as-Judge иҜ„дј°ж—¶иҜ»еҸ– API keysпјү
        env_src = self.env_config.env_path
        if env_src.exists():
            shutil.copy2(env_src, workspace / ".env")

        print(f"[WORKSPACE] Agent е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•: {workspace}")
        print(f"[SESSION] ејҖе§Ӣж–°зҡ„еҜ№иҜқдјҡиҜқпјҢжүҖжңү retry е°ҶеңЁеҗҢдёҖеҜ№иҜқдёӯиҝӣиЎҢ")
        
        # ејҖе§Ӣ Agent дјҡиҜқпјҲжүҖжңү retry еңЁеҗҢдёҖдёӘдјҡиҜқдёӯпјү
        self.agent.start_session(workspace)
        
        try:
            for attempt_idx in range(1, self.env_config.max_attempts + 1):
                result = self.run_single_attempt(
                    subtask, 
                    attempt_idx,
                    workspace,
                    feedback
                )
                attempts.append(result)
                
                # жӣҙж–°жңҖдҪіжҲҗз»©
                if result.score > best_score:
                    best_score = result.score
                    best_attempt = attempt_idx
                
                # и®°еҪ•жҳҜеҗҰжңүйҖҡиҝҮзҡ„е°қиҜ•пјҲдҪҶдёҚжҸҗеүҚз»ҲжӯўпјҢз»§з»ӯе°қиҜ•д»ҘжөӢиҜ• Agent дёҠйҷҗпјү
                if result.passed:
                    passed = True
                    print(f"\nвң“ Attempt {attempt_idx} PASSED with score {result.score}")
                else:
                    print(f"\nвң— Attempt {attempt_idx} scored {result.score}/100")
                
                # еҮҶеӨҮдёӢдёҖиҪ®зҡ„еҸҚйҰҲ
                feedback = result.feedback
                
                # з»§з»ӯе°қиҜ•зӣҙеҲ°е®ҢжҲҗжүҖжңү max_attempts ж¬Ў
                if attempt_idx < self.env_config.max_attempts:
                    print(f"    Continuing to attempt {attempt_idx + 1} (same conversation)...")
        finally:
            # иҺ·еҸ–еҜ№иҜқиҪЁиҝ№пјҲеңЁз»“жқҹдјҡиҜқд№ӢеүҚпјү
            conversation_log = self.agent.get_conversation_log()
            
            # з»“жқҹ Agent дјҡиҜқ
            self.agent.end_session()
            print(f"[SESSION] еҜ№иҜқдјҡиҜқе·Із»“жқҹ")
        
        end_time = get_timestamp()
        
        # еҲӣе»әжҖ»з»“
        # и®Ўз®—иҒҡеҗҲжҢҮж Ү
        aggregate_metrics = _compute_aggregate_metrics(attempts)

        # --- е®үе…ЁиҜ„дј° (и§„еҲҷеҢ–) ---
        safety_scores = None
        try:
            # ж”¶йӣҶжүҖжңү attempt зҡ„ tool calls
            all_tool_calls: List[ToolCallRecord] = []
            for a in attempts:
                if a.metrics and a.metrics.tool_calls:
                    all_tool_calls.extend(a.metrics.tool_calls)

            if all_tool_calls:
                scorer = SafetyScorer(
                    workspace_path=str(workspace),
                    llm_api_key=os.environ.get("EVAL_TEXT_API_KEY", ""),
                    llm_api_base=os.environ.get("EVAL_TEXT_API_BASE_URL", ""),
                    llm_model=os.environ.get("EVAL_TEXT_MODEL", ""),
                )
                safety_scores = scorer.score(all_tool_calls)
                ss = safety_scores.get("safety_score")
                vc = safety_scores.get("violation_count", {})
                print(f"[SAFETY] е®үе…ЁиҜ„дј°е®ҢжҲҗ: score={ss}, violations={vc}")
            else:
                safety_scores = {"safety_score": None, "note": "no tool calls to evaluate"}
                print("[SAFETY] ж— е·Ҙе…·и°ғз”Ёи®°еҪ•пјҢи·іиҝҮе®үе…ЁиҜ„дј°")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[SAFETY] *** е®үе…ЁиҜ„дј°еӨұиҙҘ: {e}")
            import traceback; traceback.print_exc()
            safety_scores = {"error": str(e), "safety_score": None}

        # жЈҖжөӢжҳҜеҗҰжңүд»»дҪ• attempt и¶…ж—¶
        any_timed_out = any(a.timed_out for a in attempts)

        summary = EvalSummary(
            task_id=self.task_id,
            model_name=self.env_config.target_model,
            agent_type=self.agent.agent_type,
            best_score=best_score,
            best_attempt=best_attempt,
            total_attempts=len(attempts),
            passed=passed,
            attempts=attempts,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            timed_out=any_timed_out,
            aggregate_metrics=aggregate_metrics,
            safety_scores=safety_scores,
        )
        
        # дҝқеӯҳиҜ„дј°з»“жһң
        meta_eval_path = self.run_dir / "meta_eval.json"
        write_json(meta_eval_path, summary.to_dict())
        print(f"\n[OUTPUT] Evaluation results saved to: {meta_eval_path}")
        
        # дҝқеӯҳеҜ№иҜқиҪЁиҝ№
        conversation_log_path = self.run_dir / "conversation_log.json"
        conversation_log_data = {
            "task_id": self.task_id,
            "model_name": self.env_config.target_model,
            "agent_type": self.agent.agent_type,
            "start_time": start_time,
            "end_time": end_time,
            "total_attempts": len(attempts),
            "best_score": best_score,
            "messages": conversation_log,
        }
        # д»Һ messages metadata дёӯж”¶йӣҶ execution_traceпјҲжқҘиҮӘ API д»ЈзҗҶпјү
        all_traces = []
        for msg in conversation_log:
            meta = msg.get("metadata", {})
            if meta and meta.get("execution_trace"):
                all_traces.append({
                    "attempt": msg.get("attempt", 0),
                    "trace": meta["execution_trace"],
                })
        if all_traces:
            conversation_log_data["execution_traces"] = all_traces
        write_json(conversation_log_path, conversation_log_data)
        print(f"[OUTPUT] Conversation log saved to: {conversation_log_path}")
        
        return summary


# =============================================================================
# дё»еҮҪж•°
# =============================================================================

def print_summary(summary: EvalSummary) -> None:
    """жү“еҚ°иҜ„дј°жҖ»з»“"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("EVALUATION SUMMARY")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"Task ID:        {summary.task_id}")
    print(f"Model:          {summary.model_name}")
    print(f"Agent Type:     {summary.agent_type}")
    print(f"Best Score:     {summary.best_score}/100")
    print(f"Best Attempt:   {summary.best_attempt}")
    print(f"Total Attempts: {summary.total_attempts}")
    print(f"Status:         {'PASSED вң“' if summary.passed else 'FAILED вң—'}")
    if summary.timed_out:
        print(f"Timed Out:      YES")
    print(f"Start Time:     {summary.start_time}")
    print(f"End Time:       {summary.end_time}")
    print("=" * 70)

    # жү“еҚ°жҜҸж¬Ўе°қиҜ•зҡ„еҲҶж•°
    print("\nAttempt History:")
    for a in summary.attempts:
        status = "вң“" if a.passed else "вң—"
        timeout_tag = " [TIMEOUT]" if a.timed_out else ""
        print(f"  Attempt {a.attempt_index}: {a.score}/100 {status}{timeout_tag}")


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="AgencyBench-v3 Task Evaluator",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--env", "-e",
        type=Path,
        default=Path(".env"),
        help="Path to .env file (default: .env)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--visualize", "-v",
        action="store_true",
        help="Enable visualization mode",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--eval-only",
        action="store_true",
        help="Only run evaluation on existing workspace (skip agent)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--attempt",
        type=int,
        default=None,
        help="Attempt number to re-evaluate in eval-only mode (default: latest)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--workspace", "-w",
        type=Path,
        help="Workspace path for eval-only mode",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--isolated-workspace", "-iw",
        type=Path,
        help="Isolated workspace path for Docker mode (Agent works here)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--output-dir", "-o",
        type=Path,
        help="Output directory for evaluation results (Docker mode)",
    )
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # еҠ иҪҪй…ҚзҪ®
    print(f"[CONFIG] Loading environment from: {args.env}")
    env_config = EnvConfig.load(args.env, visualize=args.visualize)
    print(f"[CONFIG] Model: {env_config.target_model}")
    print(f"[CONFIG] Agent: {env_config.agent_type}")
    print(f"[CONFIG] Output dir: {env_config.model_name}")
    print(f"[CONFIG] Max attempts: {env_config.max_attempts}")
    
    # Docker йҡ”зҰ»жЁЎејҸжЈҖжөӢ
    is_isolated_mode = args.isolated_workspace is not None or args.output_dir is not None
    if is_isolated_mode:
        print(f"[CONFIG] Docker йҡ”зҰ»жЁЎејҸе·ІеҗҜз”Ё")
        if args.isolated_workspace:
            print(f"[CONFIG] йҡ”зҰ»е·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•: {args.isolated_workspace}")
        if args.output_dir:
            print(f"[CONFIG] иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•: {args.output_dir}")
    
    if args.eval_only:
        # д»…иҜ„дј°жЁЎејҸпјҡд»Һе·Ідҝқеӯҳзҡ„ attempt зӣ®еҪ•йҮҚе»әе®Ңж•ҙ workspace еҶҚи·‘ rubric
        # иҝҷж ·еҚідҪҝд№ӢеүҚ rubric иҜ„еҲҶеӨұиҙҘпјҲеҰӮ judge API йўқеәҰиҖ—е°ҪпјүпјҢд№ҹиғҪйҮҚж–°иҜ„еҲҶ

        if args.workspace and args.workspace.exists():
            # з”ЁжҲ·зӣҙжҺҘжҢҮе®ҡдәҶе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„ workspace и·Ҝеҫ„
            workspace = args.workspace
            print(f"\n[EVAL-ONLY] дҪҝз”ЁжҢҮе®ҡ workspace: {workspace}")
        else:
            # иҮӘеҠЁд»Һ attempt зӣ®еҪ•йҮҚе»ә workspace
            # жҹҘжүҫ attempt зӣ®еҪ•жүҖеңЁзҡ„жЁЎеһӢиҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•
            model_output_dir = SCRIPT_DIR / env_config.model_name
            if args.output_dir and args.output_dir.exists():
                # Docker йҡ”зҰ»жЁЎејҸпјҡoutput_dir е·Іжңүд№ӢеүҚ copy_results_back еӨҚеҲ¶зҡ„еҶ…е®№
                # дҪҶеҗҢж—¶е®ҝдё»жңәжҢӮиҪҪзҡ„ SCRIPT_DIR/model_name д№ҹжңү
                model_output_dir = SCRIPT_DIR / env_config.model_name

            # жҹҘжүҫ attempt зӣ®еҪ•
            attempt_dirs = sorted(
                [d for d in model_output_dir.glob("attempt_*") if d.is_dir()],
                key=lambda p: int(p.name.split("_")[1]) if p.name.split("_")[1].isdigit() else 0,
            )

            if not attempt_dirs:
                print(f"[ERROR] жңӘжүҫеҲ° attempt зӣ®еҪ•: {model_output_dir}/attempt_*")
                print(f"[ERROR] иҜ·зЎ®и®Өе·ІиҝҗиЎҢиҝҮиҜ„жөӢпјҢжҲ–дҪҝз”Ё --workspace жҢҮе®ҡ workspace и·Ҝеҫ„")
                sys.exit(1)

            # йҖүжӢ© attemptпјҡз”ЁжҲ·жҢҮе®ҡ or жңҖж–°
            if args.attempt is not None:
                target = model_output_dir / f"attempt_{args.attempt}"
                if not target.exists():
                    print(f"[ERROR] жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„ attempt зӣ®еҪ•дёҚеӯҳеңЁ: {target}")
                    available = ", ".join(d.name for d in attempt_dirs)
                    print(f"[ERROR] еҸҜз”Ёзҡ„ attempt: {available}")
                    sys.exit(1)
                attempt_dir = target
            else:
                attempt_dir = attempt_dirs[-1]

            print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] дҪҝз”Ё attempt зӣ®еҪ•: {attempt_dir}")
            print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] ж–Үд»¶еҲ—иЎЁ: {[f.name for f in attempt_dir.iterdir() if f.is_file()]}")

            # йҮҚе»әе®Ңж•ҙ workspaceпјҡcontext + workspaceжЁЎжқҝ + agentдә§еҮә
            workspace = args.isolated_workspace or Path(f"/tmp/eval_only_workspace_{os.getpid()}")
            ensure_directory(workspace)
            clear_directory(workspace)

            # 1) еӨҚеҲ¶ workspace жЁЎжқҝпјҲеҺҹе§Ӣиҫ“е…Ҙж–Үд»¶пјү
            workspace_template = SCRIPT_DIR / "workspace"
            if workspace_template.exists():
                copy_input_files(workspace_template, workspace)
                print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] е·ІеӨҚеҲ¶ workspace жЁЎжқҝ")

            # 2) еӨҚеҲ¶ context зӣ®еҪ•
            context_src = SCRIPT_DIR / "context"
            if context_src.exists():
                copy_input_files(context_src, workspace / "context")
                print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] е·ІеӨҚеҲ¶ context зӣ®еҪ•")

            # 3) иҰҶзӣ– agent дә§еҮәж–Үд»¶пјҲattempt дёӯзҡ„ж–Үд»¶дјҳе…Ҳпјү
            copy_input_files(attempt_dir, workspace)
            print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] е·ІиҰҶзӣ– agent дә§еҮәж–Үд»¶")

            # 4) еӨҚеҲ¶ .envпјҲдҫӣ rubric LLM-as-Judge иҜ»еҸ– API keysпјү
            env_src = env_config.env_path
            if env_src.exists():
                shutil.copy2(env_src, workspace / ".env")

        print(f"\n[EVAL-ONLY] иҜ„дј° workspace: {workspace}")
        score, report = evaluate(str(workspace))
        print_report(score, report)

        # дҝқеӯҳиҜ„дј°з»“жһңеҲ° meta_eval.json
        output_dir = args.output_dir or SCRIPT_DIR / env_config.model_name
        ensure_directory(output_dir)
        meta_eval = {
            "eval_only": True,
            "score": score,
            "passed": score >= 80,
            "report": report,
        }
        meta_path = output_dir / "meta_eval.json"
        write_json(meta_path, meta_eval)
        print(f"[EVAL-ONLY] иҜ„дј°з»“жһңе·Ідҝқеӯҳ: {meta_path}")

        sys.exit(0 if score >= 80 else 1)
    
    # еҲқе§ӢеҢ– Agent
    agent = AgentRunner(env_config)
    
    # еҲӣе»әиҜ„дј°еҷЁе№¶иҝҗиЎҢ
    evaluator = TaskEvaluator(
        env_config, 
        agent,
        isolated_workspace=args.isolated_workspace,
        output_dir=args.output_dir,
    )
    summary = evaluator.run()
    
    # жү“еҚ°жҖ»з»“
    print_summary(summary)
    
    # иҝ”еӣһйҖҖеҮәз Ғ
    sys.exit(0 if summary.passed else 1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# task1
In this task, you need to read data_rgb.png and data_depth.png, and save them as two .npy point cloud files following the Sphere UFormer input format.
Before starting the coding task, please set up the environment first. If conda is not available, use .venv instead.
For data_rgb.png, save it as rgb.npy, which is a 2D array with n rows and 6 columns. Each row has the first three dimensions as unit sphere xyz coordinates, and the last three dimensions as rgb values conforming to the model input standard.
For data_depth.png, save it as depth.npy, which is a 2D array with n rows and 4 columns. Each row has the first three dimensions as unit sphere xyz coordinates, followed by the depth value conforming to the model input standard.
Note: You need to ensure the data format and applied processing are identical to the original model's default processing method. Required files such as valid_mask can be found under sphere_uformer; please locate them by examining the code yourself. You may need to use trimesh_utils.py.
The final required files for this task are: rgb.npy, depth.npy, and your export script. Please place the script under sphere_uformer/export/. When running, execute `python export/export.py` from within task1/sphere_uformer/src.

# Sphere UFormer Model Implementation Operation Reference

## Operation Steps

### 1. Understand Task Requirements
- Read the README.md file for detailed requirements
- Analyze the Sphere UFormer model architecture
- Understand the characteristics of spherical image processing tasks
- Determine implementation goals and direction

### 2. Data Preparation
- Load the Stanford 2D3D dataset
- Prepare training and validation data
- Data preprocessing and augmentation
- Understand the characteristics of RGB and depth images

### 3. Model Design
- Implement the Sphere UFormer architecture
- Design the spherical attention mechanism
- Design position encoding and feature extraction
- Design the decoder to output RGB and depth

### 4. Model Training
- Implement the train.py training script
- Set training parameters and hyperparameters
- Implement loss functions and optimizers
- Monitor the training process and save the model

### 5. Model Inference
- Implement model.py model architecture
- Implement inference logic
- Generate RGB and depth predictions
- Batch process test data

### 6. Result Comparison
- Implement answer/compare_npy.py comparison script
- Load reference answers and prediction results
- Calculate accuracy and error metrics
- Generate comparison report

### 7. Result Export
- Implement answer/export.py export script
- Export prediction results in standard format
- Ensure results are reproducible and verifiable

### 8. Evaluation and Verification
- Run the comparison script to verify results
- Check RGB and depth prediction accuracy
- Analyze model performance and generalization capability
- Optimize model parameters

## Notes
- Ensure stable network connection
- Reserve sufficient training time
- Verify the format of all output files
- Avoid modifying existing files
- Ensure spherical transformations are used
- Pay attention to joint processing of RGB and depth images

## Reference Tools
- Deep Learning: PyTorch, TensorFlow
- Image Processing: OpenCV, PIL
- Data Processing: numpy, pandas
- Visualization: matplotlib, tensorboard

## Common Issues and Solutions
- Poor model performance: Adjust model architecture and hyperparameters
- Unstable training: Adjust learning rate and optimizer
- Inaccurate predictions: Check data preprocessing and model architecture
- Insufficient memory: Use gradient accumulation and mixed precision
- Inconsistent RGB and depth: Check joint training and loss functions

from typing import Optional

import einops
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch import Tensor

from network.position_encoding import RelativePositionBias
from trimesh_utils import IcoSphereRef


class SphereSelfAttention(nn.Module):
    LOGIT_SCALE_PRE_REL_BIAS: bool = True

    def __init__(
            self, *,
            rank: int,
            icosphere_ref: IcoSphereRef,
            win_size_coef,
            num_heads,
            d_model,
            d_head_coef,
            qkv_bias,
            # use_v_proj,
            attn_drop=0.,
            out_drop=0.,
            abs_pos_enc: bool = False,
            abs_pos_enc_size: int = 0,
            rel_pos_bias: bool = False,
            rel_pos_bias_size: int = 0,
            rel_pos_init_variance: float = 0.0,
            append_self: bool = False,
    ):
        """
        :param num_heads: number of self attention head
        :param d_model: dimension of model
        :param dropout:
        :param num_keys: number of keys
        """

        super().__init__()

        self.rank = rank
        self.icosphere_ref = icosphere_ref
        self.win_size_coef = win_size_coef

        self.apply_rel_pos_bias = rel_pos_bias
        self.rel_pos_bias = RelativePositionBias(rank, icosphere_ref, win_size_coef, rel_pos_bias_size=rel_pos_bias_size, num_heads=num_heads, init_variance=rel_pos_init_variance)
        self.num_keys = self.rel_pos_bias.num_keys

        # We assume d_v always equals d_k, d_q = d_k = d_v = d_m // h
        assert d_model % num_heads == 0
        self.num_heads = num_heads
        self.d_model = d_model
        self.d_head = (d_model // num_heads) * d_head_coef
        assert self.d_head == int(self.d_head)

        self.append_self = append_self

        self.apply_abs_pos_enc = abs_pos_enc
        if self.apply_abs_pos_enc:
            self.q_abs_pos_proj = nn.Linear(abs_pos_enc_size, self.d_head * num_heads, bias=False)
            self.k_abs_pos_proj = nn.Linear(abs_pos_enc_size, self.d_head * num_heads, bias=False)

        self.q_proj = nn.Linear(d_model, self.d_head * num_heads, bias=qkv_bias)
        self.k_proj = nn.Linear(d_model, self.d_head * num_heads, bias=qkv_bias)
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(d_model, self.d_head * (num_heads + append_self), bias=qkv_bias)

        self.logit_scale = nn.Parameter(torch.log(10 * torch.ones((num_heads, 1, 1))), requires_grad=True)
        # self.logit_scale_pre_rel_bias = logit_scale_pre_rel_bias

        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(self.d_head * (num_heads + append_self), d_model)

        self.attn_drop = nn.Dropout(attn_drop)
        self.out_drop = nn.Dropout(out_drop)

    def forward(
            self,
            x: Tensor,
            pos: Optional[Tensor],
            query_mask: Tensor = None,
            key_masks: Optional[Tensor] = None,

    ):
        """
        :param x: B, D, C
        :param query_mask:
        :param key_masks:
        :return:
        """
        # if key_masks is None:
        #     key_masks = [None] * len(keys)

        metadata = None

        N, D, C = x.shape
        H = self.num_heads
        K = self.num_keys
        C_H = self.d_head

        # q,k,v: [N, H, D, C//H]
        q = self.q_proj(x).view(N, D, H, C_H).permute(0,2,1,3)
        k = self.k_proj(x).view(N, D, H, C_H).permute(0,2,1,3)
        v = self.v_proj(x).view(N, D, H + self.append_self, C_H).permute(0,2,1,3)
        if self.append_self:
            v, v_self = torch.split(v, (H, 1), dim=1)
            v_self = v_self.squeeze(1)

        if self.apply_abs_pos_enc:
            assert D == pos.shape[1]
            q_pos = self.q_abs_pos_proj(pos).view(1, D, H, C_H).permute(0,2,1,3)
            k_pos = self.k_abs_pos_proj(pos).view(1, D, H, C_H).permute(0,2,1,3)
            q = q + q_pos
            k = k + k_pos

        q = F.normalize(q, dim=-1)
        k = F.normalize(k, dim=-1)

        # aligned: [N, H, D, K, C//H]
        # expanded_idx = self.idx[None, None, :, :, None].expand(N, H, -1, -1, C_H)
        # expanded_idx_mask = self.idx_mask[None, None, :, :].expand(N, H, -1, -1)
        expanded_idx = self.rel_pos_bias.idx.expand(N, H, -1, -1, C_H)
        expanded_idx_mask = self.rel_pos_bias.idx_mask.expand(N, H, -1, -1)
        expanded_k = k[:, :, :, None, :].expand(-1, -1, -1, K, -1)
        expanded_v = v[:, :, :, None, :].expand(-1, -1, -1, K, -1)

        aligned_k = torch.gather(expanded_k, dim=2, index=expanded_idx)
        aligned_v = torch.gather(expanded_v, dim=2, index=expanded_idx)

        # (q: [N, H, D, C_H] , aligned_k: [N, H, D, K, C_H]) -> attn: [N, H, D, K]
        attn = (q[:, :, :, None, :] * aligned_k).sum(-1)

        if self.LOGIT_SCALE_PRE_REL_BIAS:
            logit_scale = torch.clamp(self.logit_scale, max=torch.log(torch.tensor(1. / 0.01))).exp()
            attn = attn * logit_scale

        if self.apply_rel_pos_bias:
            rel_coords, rel_bias = self.rel_pos_bias(aligned_k)
            attn = attn + rel_bias

        if not self.LOGIT_SCALE_PRE_REL_BIAS:
            logit_scale = torch.clamp(self.logit_scale, max=torch.log(torch.tensor(1. / 0.01))).exp()
            attn = attn * logit_scale

        # mask for cases where number of keys < max number of keys
        attn = torch.masked_fill(attn, mask=~expanded_idx_mask, value=float('-inf'))

        # B, H, D, K
        attn = F.softmax(attn, dim=-1)

        # mask nan position
        if query_mask is not None:
            raise NotImplementedError("No support for query_mask")
            # B, H, W, 1, 1
            query_mask_ = query_mask.unsqueeze(dim=-1).unsqueeze(dim=-1)
            attn = torch.masked_fill(attn, query_mask_.expand_as(attn), 0.0)

        attn = self.attn_drop(attn)

        # (attn: [N, H, D, K] , aligned_v: [N, H, D, K, C_H]) -> out: [N, H, D, C_H]
        out = (attn.unsqueeze(-1) * aligned_v).sum(-2)
        # out = out.permute(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(N, D, C)
        out = einops.rearrange(out, "N H D C_H -> N D (H C_H)")
        if self.append_self:
            out = torch.cat((out, v_self), dim=-1)
        out = self.out_proj(out)
        out = self.out_drop(out)

        return out

import math

import numpy as np
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch import nn, Tensor
from tqdm import tqdm

from trimesh_utils import IcoSphereRef, asSpherical


def get_rotation_matrices(rphitheta: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    r, p, t = rphitheta.T
    p = (90-p) / 180 * np.pi
    t = t / 180 * np.pi
    zeros, ones = np.zeros_like(t), np.ones_like(t)
    mat_t = np.array([
        [np.cos(-t), -np.sin(-t), zeros],
        [np.sin(-t), np.cos(-t), zeros],
        [zeros, zeros, ones],
    ]).transpose(2,0,1)
    mat_p = np.array([
        [np.cos(p), zeros, np.sin(p)],
        [zeros, ones, zeros],
        [-np.sin(p), zeros, np.cos(p)],
    ]).transpose(2,0,1)
    return mat_p @ mat_t


class GlobalVerticalPositionEnconding(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, rank: int, icosphere_ref: IcoSphereRef, mode: str, num_pos_feats, max_frequency, min_frequency=1, scale=None):
        super().__init__()

        self.num_pos_feats = num_pos_feats
        self.max_frequency = max_frequency
        self.min_frequency = min_frequency
        if scale is None:
            scale = math.pi
        self.scale = scale

        normals = icosphere_ref.get_normals(rank)

        # pos_value in [-1, 1]
        if mode == "z":
            pos_value = normals[:, 2]
        elif mode == "phi":
            pos_value = asSpherical(normals)[:, 1] / 180 * 2 - 1
        else:
            raise NotImplementedError()
        pos_value = torch.tensor(pos_value.copy(), dtype=torch.float32).view(-1,1)

        dim_f = torch.linspace(0, 1, num_pos_feats // 2, dtype=torch.float32)
        dim_f = self.max_frequency ** dim_f * self.min_frequency ** (1-dim_f)

        pos = pos_value * self.scale * dim_f
        pos = torch.stack((pos.sin(), pos.cos()), dim=1).flatten(start_dim=1)
        self.register_buffer("pos", pos, persistent=False)

    def forward(self, x: Tensor):
        # N, D, C = x.shape
        # assert D == self.pos.shape[0]
        pos = self.pos.unsqueeze(0)
        return pos


class RelativePositionBias(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, rank: int, icosphere_ref: IcoSphereRef, win_size_coef: int, rel_pos_bias_size: int, num_heads: int, init_variance: float = 10):
        assert rel_pos_bias_size > 0

        super().__init__()

        self.rank = rank

        normals = icosphere_ref.get_normals(rank)

        normals_rphitheta = asSpherical(normals)
        rot_mat = get_rotation_matrices(normals_rphitheta)

        mapping = icosphere_ref.get_neighbor_mapping(rank=rank, depth=win_size_coef)

        self.num_nodes = len(mapping)
        self.num_keys = max(len(_) for _ in mapping)

        # B, H, D, K, C_H (idx is the same for B,H,C_)
        idx = torch.arange(0, self.num_nodes).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_keys).clone()  # each query by default keys itself
        idx_mask = torch.zeros(self.num_nodes, self.num_keys).bool()
        for i, keys in tqdm(enumerate(mapping), desc=f"RelativePositionBias - index mapping {rank}"):
            idx[i, :len(keys)] = torch.tensor(list(keys))
            idx_mask[i, :len(keys)] = 1

        # Register for use by the attention module
        self.register_buffer("idx", idx[None, None, :, :, None], persistent=False)
        self.register_buffer("idx_mask", idx_mask[None, None, :, :], persistent=False)

        expanded_normals = torch.tensor(normals.copy(), dtype=torch.float64).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_keys, -1)
        expanded_idx = idx.unsqueeze(2).expand(-1, -1, 3)
        aligned_neighbors = torch.gather(expanded_normals, dim=0, index=expanded_idx).numpy()

        rotated_neighbors = (rot_mat @ aligned_neighbors.transpose(0,2,1)).transpose(0,2,1)
        rotated_neighbors_flat = rotated_neighbors.reshape(self.num_nodes*self.num_keys, 3)
        relative_coords_flat = (asSpherical(rotated_neighbors_flat)[:, 1:] - np.array([[90, 0]]))
        relative_coords = relative_coords_flat.reshape(self.num_nodes, self.num_keys, 2)

        self.register_buffer("relative_coords", torch.tensor(relative_coords).float(), persistent=False)
        self.bias_grid = nn.Parameter(init_variance * torch.randn(1, num_heads, rel_pos_bias_size, rel_pos_bias_size), requires_grad=True)

    def get_neighbor_idx(self):
        return self.idx, self.idx_mask

    def forward(self, keys: Tensor):
        N, H, D, K, C_H = keys.shape
        assert D == self.relative_coords.shape[0]
        assert K == self.relative_coords.shape[1]
        # if not hasattr(self, "relative_coords"):
        #     self._calculate_ralative_coords()
        #     self.register_buffer("relative_coords", relative_coords, persistent=False)

        rel_coords = self.relative_coords.unsqueeze(0)  # all images same coords
        rel_coords_normalized = rel_coords / (rel_coords.abs().max() + 1e-8)
        rel_bias = F.grid_sample(self.bias_grid, grid=rel_coords_normalized, align_corners=True)
        return rel_coords, rel_bias

"""
model.py вҖ” Sphere UFormer model architecture for spherical 360В° perception.

Based on: "SphereUFormer: A U-Shaped Transformer for Spherical 360В° Perception"
           CVPR 2025

Architecture overview
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Input: (N, D, C)  where D = number of icosphere nodes, C = input channels

1. Input projection:  Linear(C  -> embed_dim)
2. Encoder:           num_scales down-sampling stages, each with
                      SphereUFormerModule (stacked SphereUFormerBlock) +
                      Downsample (center-based) + channel doubling
3. Bottleneck:        SphereUFormerModule at coarsest resolution
4. Decoder:           num_scales up-sampling stages, each with
                      Upsample (interpolation) + skip concat + SphereUFormerModule
5. Output projection: Linear(embed_dim -> out_channels)

Key components
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вҖў SphereUFormerBlock      вҖ” one transformer block (Spherical Local SA + MLP)
вҖў SphereSelfAttention     вҖ” windowed self-attention indexed by icosphere neighbors
вҖў RelativePositionBias    вҖ” relative angular position bias for sphere attention
вҖў GlobalVerticalPositionEncoding вҖ” sinusoidal encoding on vertical angle ПҶ

Run in standalone mode to verify the model builds without error:
    python model.py

Export script for converting equirectangular RGB and depth images to spherical
point cloud format following the SphereUFormer (CVPR 2025) input standard.

Usage (run from sphere_uformer/src directory):

    python export/export.py
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys

import cv2
import numpy as np
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

# Add the src directory to the path so trimesh_utils etc. can be imported
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))

from trimesh_utils import IcoSphereRef, asSpherical


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Configuration defaults
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

DEFAULT_SPHERE_RANK = 7          # icosphere subdivision level used by the model
DEFAULT_SPHERE_NODE_TYPE = "vertex"  # "vertex" is the default for SphereUFormer
DEFAULT_MAX_DEPTH = 5120          # Stanford2D3D MAX_DEPTH constant


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# CLI
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def parse_args():
    # Resolve paths relative to the sphere_uformer/src directory (cwd expected)
    src_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
    workspace_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(src_dir))  # two levels up: workspace root

    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Export equirectangular images to SphereUFormer icosphere point clouds"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--rgb_path",
        type=str,
        default=os.path.join(workspace_dir, "data_rgb.png"),
        help="Path to RGB equirectangular image (default: ../../data_rgb.png)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--depth_path",
        type=str,
        default=os.path.join(workspace_dir, "data_depth.png"),
        help="Path to depth equirectangular image (default: ../../data_depth.png)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--output_dir",
        type=str,
        default=os.path.join(workspace_dir, "answer"),
        help="Output directory for .npy files (default: ../../answer)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--sphere_rank",
        type=int,
        default=DEFAULT_SPHERE_RANK,
        help=f"Icosphere subdivision rank (default: {DEFAULT_SPHERE_RANK})",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--sphere_node_type",
        type=str,
        default=DEFAULT_SPHERE_NODE_TYPE,
        choices=["vertex", "face"],
        help=f"Icosphere node type (default: {DEFAULT_SPHERE_NODE_TYPE})",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--valid_mask_path",
        type=str,
        default=None,
        help="Optional path to valid mask PNG (default: uses data/stanford2d3d_mask_pretty.png)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--max_depth",
        type=int,
        default=DEFAULT_MAX_DEPTH,
        help=f"Maximum depth value for normalization (default: {DEFAULT_MAX_DEPTH})",
    )
    return parser.parse_args()


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Data loading
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def load_images(rgb_path: str, depth_path: str):
    """Load RGB and depth equirectangular images."""
    rgb = cv2.imread(rgb_path)
    if rgb is None:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Cannot load RGB image: {rgb_path}")
    rgb = cv2.cvtColor(rgb, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)

    depth = cv2.imread(depth_path, cv2.IMREAD_UNCHANGED)
    if depth is None:
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Cannot load depth image: {depth_path}")
    depth = depth.astype(np.float32)

    print(f"  RGB   shape : {rgb.shape}  dtype={rgb.dtype}")
    print(f"  Depth shape : {depth.shape}  dtype={depth.dtype}")
    return rgb, depth


def load_valid_mask(mask_path=None):
    """Load the valid pixel mask used by Stanford2D3D."""
    if mask_path is None:
        # Default: relative to the src directory (same as stanford2d3d.py)
        src_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
        mask_path = os.path.join(src_dir, "data", "stanford2d3d_mask_pretty.png")

    if os.path.isfile(mask_path):
        valid_mask = cv2.imread(mask_path, cv2.IMREAD_UNCHANGED) > 0
        print(f"  Valid mask  : {mask_path}  shape={valid_mask.shape}")
        return valid_mask
    else:
        print(f"  Valid mask  : not found at {mask_path}, using all-ones mask")
        return None


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Sphere sampling grid
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def build_sphere_grid(sphere_rank: int, sphere_node_type: str):
    """
    Build the grid_sample coordinate grid for icosphere sampling.

    Returns:
        normals   : (N_nodes, 3)  unit-sphere XYZ coordinates
        normals_wh: (N_nodes, 2)  grid_sample coordinates (w, h) in [-1, 1]
    """
    ref = IcoSphereRef(sphere_node_type)
    normals = ref.get_normals(rank=sphere_rank)          # (N, 3)
    normals_rphitheta = asSpherical(normals)              # (N, 3): r, phi [0,180], theta [-180,180]

    # Following stanford2d3d.py exactly:
    #   w = theta / 180         вҶ’ maps [-180, 180] to [-1, 1]
    #   h = phi / 180 * 2 - 1  вҶ’ maps [0, 180]    to [-1, 1]
    normals_wh = np.stack(
        (
            normals_rphitheta[:, 2] / 180,           # theta вҶ’ w
            normals_rphitheta[:, 1] / 180 * 2 - 1,  # phi   вҶ’ h
        ),
        axis=1,
    ).astype(np.float32)

    print(f"  Sphere nodes: {normals.shape[0]}  (rank={sphere_rank}, type={sphere_node_type})")
    print(f"  w range : [{normals_wh[:, 0].min():.4f}, {normals_wh[:, 0].max():.4f}]")
    print(f"  h range : [{normals_wh[:, 1].min():.4f}, {normals_wh[:, 1].max():.4f}]")
    return normals, normals_wh


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Sampling
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def sample_sphere(rgb: np.ndarray, depth: np.ndarray, normals_wh: np.ndarray):
    """
    Sample RGB and depth values from equirectangular images onto icosphere nodes
    using F.grid_sample (bilinear interpolation), exactly as in stanford2d3d.py.

    Returns:
        sphere_rgb  : (N, 3)  uint8
        sphere_depth: (N,)    float32
    """
    sphere_grid = torch.tensor(normals_wh).reshape(1, -1, 1, 2)  # (1, N, 1, 2)

    # в”Җв”Җ RGB в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
    rgb_t = torch.tensor(rgb).permute(2, 0, 1).float().unsqueeze(0)  # (1, 3, H, W)
    sampled_rgb = F.grid_sample(
        input=rgb_t,
        grid=sphere_grid,
        padding_mode="border",
        align_corners=False,
    )
    # (1, 3, N, 1) вҶ’ (N, 3) uint8  (matching stanford2d3d.py's _convert_to_sphere)
    sampled_rgb = (
        sampled_rgb.squeeze(0).squeeze(2).permute(1, 0)
        .reshape(-1, 1, 3).squeeze(1).numpy().astype(np.uint8)
    )

    # в”Җв”Җ Depth в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
    depth_t = torch.tensor(depth).unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0).float()  # (1, 1, H, W)
    sampled_depth = F.grid_sample(
        input=depth_t,
        grid=sphere_grid,
        padding_mode="border",
        align_corners=False,
    )
    # (1, 1, N, 1) вҶ’ (N,)
    sampled_depth = sampled_depth.squeeze(0).squeeze(0).squeeze(1).numpy()

    return sampled_rgb, sampled_depth


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Export helpers
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def export_rgb_npy(normals: np.ndarray, sphere_rgb: np.ndarray, path: str):
    """
    Save rgb.npy: shape (N, 6)
      cols 0-2 : unit-sphere XYZ
      cols 3-5 : RGB normalised to [0, 1]  (Г· 255, matching model input standard)
    """
    rgb_norm = sphere_rgb.astype(np.float32) / 255.0
    data = np.concatenate([normals.astype(np.float32), rgb_norm], axis=1)
    np.save(path, data)
    print(f"  rgb.npy   вҶ’ {path}  shape={data.shape}  "
          f"xyz=[{normals.min():.4f},{normals.max():.4f}]  "
          f"rgb=[{rgb_norm.min():.4f},{rgb_norm.max():.4f}]")
    return data


def export_depth_npy(normals: np.ndarray, sphere_depth: np.ndarray, path: str,
                     max_depth: int = DEFAULT_MAX_DEPTH):
    """
    Save depth.npy: shape (N, 4)
      cols 0-2 : unit-sphere XYZ
      col  3   : depth normalised to [0, 1]  (clip to max_depth then Г· max_depth)
    """
    depth_norm = np.clip(sphere_depth, 0, max_depth).astype(np.float32) / max_depth
    data = np.concatenate(
        [normals.astype(np.float32), depth_norm.reshape(-1, 1)], axis=1
    )
    np.save(path, data)
    print(f"  depth.npy вҶ’ {path}  shape={data.shape}  "
          f"xyz=[{normals.min():.4f},{normals.max():.4f}]  "
          f"depth=[{depth_norm.min():.4f},{depth_norm.max():.4f}]")
    return data


# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
# Main
# в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

def main():
    args = parse_args()

    sep = "=" * 60
    print(sep)
    print("SphereUFormer Export")
    print(sep)

    # 1. Load images
    print("\n[1] Loading images вҖҰ")
    rgb, depth = load_images(args.rgb_path, args.depth_path)
    valid_mask = load_valid_mask(args.valid_mask_path)

    # 2. Apply valid mask (same as stanford2d3d.py getitem)
    if valid_mask is not None:
        # Make sure the mask matches image resolution
        if valid_mask.shape[:2] != rgb.shape[:2]:
            valid_mask = cv2.resize(
                valid_mask.astype(np.uint8),
                (rgb.shape[1], rgb.shape[0]),
                interpolation=cv2.INTER_NEAREST,
            ).astype(bool)
        depth = depth.copy()
        depth[valid_mask == 0] = np.inf  # mask out invalid depth pixels

    # Mask depth extremes (same as stanford2d3d.py)
    depth[depth > args.max_depth] = np.inf
    depth[depth == 0] = np.inf

    # For sampling we need finite values; replace inf with max_depth temporarily
    depth_for_sampling = depth.copy()
    depth_for_sampling[~np.isfinite(depth_for_sampling)] = args.max_depth

    # 3. Build sphere sampling grid
    print("\n[2] Building icosphere sampling grid вҖҰ")
    normals, normals_wh = build_sphere_grid(args.sphere_rank, args.sphere_node_type)

    # 4. Sample
    print("\n[3] Sampling from equirectangular images вҖҰ")
    sphere_rgb, sphere_depth = sample_sphere(rgb, depth_for_sampling, normals_wh)
    print(f"  sampled_rgb  : shape={sphere_rgb.shape}")
    print(f"  sampled_depth: shape={sphere_depth.shape}  "
          f"range=[{sphere_depth.min():.2f}, {sphere_depth.max():.2f}]")

    # 5. Export
    print("\n[4] Exporting вҖҰ")
    os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
    export_rgb_npy(normals, sphere_rgb, os.path.join(args.output_dir, "rgb.npy"))
    export_depth_npy(normals, sphere_depth, os.path.join(args.output_dir, "depth.npy"),
                     max_depth=args.max_depth)

    print(f"\n{sep}")
    print("Export complete!")
    print(sep)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
"}
